jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Hopscotch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Hopscotch. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Hopscotch:
Hopscotch is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hopscotch!
